details.shortText: Brijesh Sharma to Sai Sudharsan, OUT
details.text: Oh my, B Sai Sudharsan is hit wicket twice in two innings! This is unbeleivable! Low full toss outside off and he drives it with an open face. The ball goes away fine on the off side for four, but in his follow through, the bat goes flying out of his hands and lands on the stumps. Gill is on his haunches, he can't believe it, and neither can Sai Sudharsan! Even Jurel is sympathetic as he comes over and hands SaiSu his bat back, and gives him a pat on the shoulder

Oh, that looks plumb, and it's given! Gill misses his flick and Archer raps him on the pads. This was full around off and swerving in slightly. Muted celebrations from Archer and RR as Gill walks back after having all but won the game for his team. It's a cliche, but that was a "captain's knock"

Washington miscues it and Ferreira grabs a good catch. Tries to take on this length ball outside off, but it's a cutter and he's early into the shot. Goes high in the air and Ferreira at long-on has to run in and to his left to get under it, and the South African makes no mistake

Placement fails Jaiswal, he launched a pull, seemed like he wanted to get it much finer but top-edged it to deep-backward square. 139ks short of length at the hips, shot was on but it'll be a first-over wicket for Siraj

wicket.shortText: c Prasidh Krishna b Mohammed Siraj

details.text: Pitched up and Rabada strikes! He went full and on middle and off, 146ks and may have seamed away a touch. Jurel stood on leg and went for a lofted off drive. Bat-face opened and it floated high to mid-off.

Slot ball, caught at the boundary. Parag, expressionless, stands still as Holder upper-cuts the air in celebration. This was full on leg at 132ks, flicked it a touch too early, toed it to deep midwicket.

The short-ball ploy has worked so well for Gujarat Titans today! Shanaka has feathered it behind! Banged in short outside off and angling into Shanaka, who looks for the pull. He's cramped for room and gloves it behind and it's bread, butter, eggs and bacon for Jos Buttler!

Edged, and taken. The Archer experiment is done as GT celebrate a fifth wicket! Test match stuff, a length ball outside off that straightens off the pitch, drawing Archer into the drive. Archer goes at it at full tilt and gets a thick edge and Buttler does the rest

Oh boy, Sooryavanshi falls short by four runs this time! He was out for 97 in the last game, he goes for 96 today. Silence all around as Sooryavanshi looks to tennis-smash this short ball. Like in the last game, this ends up going up off the toe end and it's a simple catch at deep third, where Prasidh takes the catch. Very similar to how he got out in the last game, and he's distraught. The silence soon makes way for applause as he walks off

Oh my, B Sai Sudharsan is hit wicket twice in two innings! This is unbeleivable! Low full toss outside off and he drives it with an open face. The ball goes away fine on the off side for four, but in his follow through, the bat goes flying out of his hands and lands on the stumps. Gill is on his haunches, he can't believe it, and neither can Sai Sudharsan! Even Jurel is sympathetic as he comes over and hands SaiSu his bat back, and gives him a pat on the shoulder
